summary: Canonical issue #36212 remains the issue-thread anchor, but the hydrated artifact shows the underlying queue metadata bug is now covered by merged PR #90943 on main. Open PR #91272 is a narrow contributor fix for the same root cause, but it is now redundant, dirty against main, and has failing real-behavior proof, so it should not be merged from this cluster.

actions.reason: Keep #36212 as the canonical issue thread because it is the clearest issue report and live open anchor; do not close it from this plan because post-merge closeout is disabled.
Historical merged fix evidence only; no mutation is applicable to an already merged PR.
Superseded by merged #90943 on current main; closure is planned rather than executed and must be re-fetched by the applicator before any comment/close mutation.
